candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash; useful cross-check but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning-of-period cash, not the balance-sheet stock at year-end.

variables.notes: Preferred the balance sheet cash line over cash flow statement period-begin/end lines.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not LCT.
A component of non-current liabilities, not total current liabilities.
Best short-term debt line on the balance sheet; financing-related current liabilities and lease liabilities are shown separately, so this cleanly captures STD excluding leases.
Could represent current maturities, but values are blank and the label is less clearly the reported debt line here.
Appears to be a current financial liabilities line in some periods, but 'Financial Liabilities - Short-Term' is more explicit and preferable where available.

variables.notes: OK. R:c. Chose a non-shortlist label because it is the clearest balance-sheet short-term debt line. Excluded 'Lease Liabilities' per instruction.

candidates.row_label: Tax liabilities based on taxable income for the period
candidates.why: Direct current tax payable/current tax liability label on the balance sheet.
Deferred tax, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Tax assets based on taxable income for the period
candidates.why: Tax asset, opposite sign/category of payable.

final_choice.row_label: Tax liabilities based on taxable income for the period

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed; selected the explicit current tax liability line.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet measure for total property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets; preferable to cash flow capex lines.
Capital expenditures flow, not the PPE stock on the balance sheet.
Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.
Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Used total tangible assets as the best available proxy for total/net PPE. Right-of-use assets are shown separately, so this line should reflect core tangibles.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities.
